movie.overview: An expansive Russian drama, this film focuses on the life of revered religious icon painter Andrei Rublev. Drifting from place to place in a tumultuous era, the peace-seeking monk eventually gains a reputation for his art. But after Rublev witnesses a brutal battle and unintentionally becomes involved, he takes a vow of silence and spends time away from his work. As he begins to ease his troubled soul, he takes steps towards becoming a painter once again.
movie.tagline: In much wisdom there is much grief.
movie.title: Andrei Rublev

cast.name: Nikolay Grabbe
cast.character: Stepan, Centurion of the Grand Duke
